title: Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar
tagline: Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

heroImage.alt: Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar, Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Christ Church is a non-denominational Christian church, previously Anglican, located on Mall Road, Mhow, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Christ Church is a non-denominational Christian church, previously Anglican, located on Mall Road, Mhow, Madhya Pradesh, India. It was built by men of the Warwickshire and Brecknockshire regiments, the first British army units to be based in Mhow, as a garrison church, and consecrated in 1823. In addition to being a functional church, the building is a major tourist attraction for the array of Commemorative and Memorial plaques that have been installed by various units of the British Army during their tenures at Mhow.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Devi Ahilya Bai Holkar Airport, Indore (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (186 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar?
faq.a: Stays in Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Christ Church, Dr.Ambedkar Nagar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mhow, Mhowgaon, Tihi, Dongargaon, Indore, Bhatkhedi.
